for really cold, wet days

this is really disappointing

i want the duplicate refunded

yes a human please

name: core_refuse_escalation_then_shop

a gift for my girlfriend who loves the gym
under $100

name: core_answers_policy
turns: what's your return policy
do you ship to canada

name: core_multiintent_gift_and_order
turns: suggest a gift for my dad who hikes, and also tell me where order AB12345 is
make the gift under $100

name: core_stuck_specialist_pivot_to_gift
turns: would you please help me get a gift for my girlfriend
she's into hiking
around $100

name: where_is_order_then_what_to_order
turns: Where is my order AB12345? It was supposed to arrive Tuesday.
Ok thanks. While I wait, what should I order for early fall? I like light layers.
The cheaper one?
In black?

name: broken_zipper_vs_zipper_shopping
turns: The zipper on the jacket from my order KL88321 broke after one wear. This is really disappointing.
Fine, I'll deal with the return later. Can you recommend a jacket that actually has a good zipper?
Which is warmest?
Does it come in navy?

name: yoga_gift_sounds_like_escalation
turns: I need help. I need a gift for a person who loves yoga.
Something under 60 dollars please.
Do you gift wrap orders?

name: refuses_human_wants_to_shop
turns: No, I don't want to talk to a human or an agent, just help me shop for running shorts.
5 inch inseam, with pockets.
The cheaper one?

name: policy_questions_then_shopping_pivot
turns: What's your return policy?
Do you ship to Canada, and how long does that take?
Great, then show me a rain jacket that would ship in time for a trip next Friday.

name: multi_intent_gift_plus_order_status
turns: Suggest a gift for my dad and tell me where order CD20987 is.
He's into fishing and hates bright colors.
And did that order actually ship yet or is it still processing?

name: escalation_then_pivot_back_to_sara
turns: This is ridiculous, I need to speak to a human right now.
Actually never mind, it's not worth the wait. Can you just help me find a summer dress for a beach wedding?
Something midi length, not strapless.
In yellow?

name: fragment_chain_winter_coat
turns: I'm looking for a winter coat for my husband, he walks to work in Chicago.
Which is warmest?
The cheaper one?
Ok and what if he doesn't like it, can he return it after Christmas?

name: double_charge_then_demands_human
turns: I was charged twice for order XY44567, there are two identical charges on my card.
How long do refunds usually take to show up?
That's too long. If this can't be fixed right now I want to talk to a real person.

name: wrong_item_then_shops_replacement
turns: Order MN90210 arrived with the wrong item. I ordered gloves and got a scarf.
How do I send the scarf back?
Actually, while we're at it, can you suggest gloves warmer than the ones I originally ordered?
Touchscreen friendly?

name: return_own_boots_then_refund_status
turns: I want to return the boots from my order QR55643, they run small.
What's the status of my refund once you get them back?
And the store credit option? Is that faster?

name: shipping_policy_vs_my_shipment
turns: Do you ship to Canada?
Great, and is my order TB70211 the one shipping there? I moved recently.
When will it arrive?

turns: Hi! I need a gift for my father, he's turning 60 next month and spends a lot of time outdoors.
Something around $100 would be ideal.
Which of those is the warmest?
Nice, does that one come in navy?

Perfect. Is that available in a medium?

name: daughter_gift_then_escalation
turns: Looking for a gift for my daughter, she's heading off to college in the fall.
She basically lives in leggings, so probably start there.
Actually wait, before I order anything, my last package showed up ripped open and half empty. Can I talk to a human about that?
Thanks. Ok back to the leggings, do any of those have pockets?
Great, add the pocket ones in size small.

name: secret_santa_unknown_recipient
turns: I got picked for secret santa at work and I don't even know who I'm getting yet lol. Need ideas under $40.
Something unisex is probably safest right?
Do you have like beanies or bags or anything?
The bag works. What's the return policy in case they hate it?
